title: Churn Risk Surge — 312 Members Crossed 70% Threshold
description: 312 members crossed the 70% churn probability threshold this week, up from 198 last week. Concentrated in military retiree and single-product segments.

title: Digital Engagement Decay — 1,243 Members No Login 90+ Days
description: 1,243 members have not logged into any digital channel in 90+ days. This cohort grew 14% in the last month. 62% are single-product holders.

title: Military Retiree NPS Dropped 13 Points
description: Military retiree segment NPS fell from 52 to 39 over 6 months. Top detractor theme: CD rate transparency and loyalty recognition. This segment holds $31.6M in CD balances.
